---
title: "BIOSTAT 620 Final Presentation"
author: "Katie Zhao"
format: revealjs
---

# In the morning

## Getting up

-   Turn off alarm
-   Get out of b

## Breakfast

-   Eat eggs
-   Drink coffee

# In the evening

## Dinner

-   Eat spaghetti
-   Drink wine

## Going to sleep

-   Get in bed
-   Count sheep
